name: HAMARTOMA OF CHEST WALL
definition: MESENCHYMOMA (incorrect as it implies neoplasm) focal overgrowth of normal skeletal elements with a benign self-limited course; extremely
dominant_finding: moderate / large extrapleural well-circumscribed mass affecting one / more ribs
discriminating_features: moderate / large extrapleural well-circumscribed mass affecting one / more ribs
ribs near center of mass partially / completely destroyed
significant amount of calcification / ossification (DDx: aneurysmal bone cyst)

general: moderate / large extrapleural well-circumscribed mass affecting one / more ribs
ribs near center of mass partially / completely destroyed
significant amount of calcification / ossification (DDx: aneurysmal bone cyst)
